tags.name: Stores
tags.description: Store management, webhooks, and provider configuration

post.summary: Sign in with email and password
Initiate password reset — sends code to email

put.summary: Complete password reset with code and new password

post.summary: Exchange Google OAuth authorization code for tokens

get.summary: List audit logs with optional search and filters

post.summary: Complete a manual payout with tx hash
Reject a manual payout and reverse balance

put.summary: Create or update a fee configuration

get.summary: Get aggregated revenue from processing fees
List payments where balance credit failed

post.summary: Retry balance credit for a failed payment
Create or update a master wallet for a provider/network

get.description: Returns duplicate payment creation attempts that were deduplicated by merchant reference. Use this to spot merchants with integration bugs making double API calls.

post.description: Fetches CPay's currency list and updates the minTxAmount field in currency_provider_mappings using CPay's replenishMinimumValue. Run this after adding new currencies or when CPay updates their minimums.

get.description: Serves the checkout page for a session.
Handles the redirect after a customer completes payment on the provider's checkout page. Syncs payment status with the provider and redirects to the merchant's success URL if configured.
Handles the redirect when a customer cancels on the provider's checkout page. Redirects to the merchant's cancel URL if configured.
Retrieve the current status of a checkout session. Pass ?sync=true to force a live sync with the payment provider.

post.description: Creates a new checkout session. The response includes a `checkout_url` that the customer should be redirected to for payment. After payment, the provider will fire a webhook to record the payment, and the customer will be redirected back to the success/cancel URL. Supports idempotency via the Idempotency-Key header.

get.description: Returns a presigned S3 URL to download the SouthPay WooCommerce plugin. URL expires in 5 minutes.

get.summary: List currencies supported by a provider
Get currency by code and network

get.description: Get the current status of a payment by its ID. Returns limited information as this endpoint is public.

post.description: Create a new payment for a store. Supports idempotency via the Idempotency-Key header.

get.description: Get a paginated list of payments for a specific store. Supports filtering by merchant reference and date range, with configurable sorting.

post.description: Request a payout using the store's preferred payout detail (bank or crypto)

get.description: Fetch payout details and current status
Get all payouts for a specific store

get.summary: List all payments for a store
Get payout details for a store

put.summary: Upsert payout details for a store

post.description: Withdraw funds from the store's internal balance to the configured payout destination

get.description: Get all payouts for this store

post.description: Receives a webhook for a specific store. The provider is automatically resolved from the store's default provider configuration, so the sender does not need to specify which provider it is.

get.description: SSE stream of payment events for a store. Requires store_id query param.
List notifications across all user stores. Supports pagination and filtering by unread_only and store_id.

post.description: Mark all unread notifications as read. Optionally filter by store_id.
Get the best offer for converting a currency without executing
Swap a currency to the target currency. Debits source from balance, credits target after swap.

get.description: Get the swap history for a store
Returns all currency balances for the store
Returns paginated transaction history. Optional ?currency= filter.
